comment: PEDAL BUILD manifest for Howl (3-knob). build.py reads THIS file. Tuned 2-pole resonator feedback howl; Level scales the howl output.
gid_comment: 0x08 = Delay category -> SONAME prefix ZDL_DLY_. Grouped under DLY (fewest stock effects = easy to find).

params.name: Annihil
params.comment: params[6]. Pole radius: short ring -> long howl.

audio_nop_comment: Set true for a UI-only smoke build before trusting the DSP.
